summary: Management Intelligence AI feature fully tested. All 19 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend dashboard fully functional with 4 KPI cards, 3 insight cards, AI chat, room availability panel, and upcoming arrivals panel. Role-based access control working correctly - only manager/admin can access, guest/front_desk blocked (403).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Management Intelligence AI fully tested. Backend endpoints: GET /api/management/metrics (real-time KPIs), POST /api/management/chat (AI chat with live data), GET /api/management/insights (AI-generated business insights), GET /api/management/examples. All use real Gemini LLM - no mocked APIs. Frontend shows 4 KPI cards (Occupancy 30%, Revenue $7,653, Active Reservations 9, Available Rooms 14), 3 insight cards (Low Occupancy warning, Arrivals Today, Strong Revenue Day), AI chat panel, Room Availability breakdown by type, Upcoming Arrivals guest list. RBAC verified: manager/admin=full access, front_desk/guest=403 Forbidden.
